message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Bundestagswahlen 1972 (German Federal Parliament Election 1972)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0354","justification":"Election study on the 1972 Bundestag election, focusing on political attitudes, participation, and evaluations of parties and government in West Germany in the early 1970s."},{"title":"Bundesrepublik Deutschland Trend 1977 (ALLBUS precursor: Political Attitudes and Government, 1977)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0395","justification":"Survey on political attitudes in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1977, including trust in political institutions, satisfaction with government, and views of the political system."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen, politische Partizipation und Demokratieverständnis 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10688","justification":"Study of political attitudes, political participation, and understanding of democracy in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1973, directly addressing perceptions of the political system and its institutions."},{"title":"Politik und Gesellschaft in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10809","justification":"Survey on politics and society in West Germany in 1975; includes evaluations of political institutions, parties, and the functioning of the political system."},{"title":"Jugend und Politik 1974 (Youth and Politics 1974 in the Federal Republic of Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10846","justification":"Focuses on political orientations and participation of young people in West Germany in 1974, including attitudes toward government and political institutions."},{"title":"Regierungs- und Oppositionsimages in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10992","justification":"Examines images of government and opposition in West Germany in 1970, addressing perceptions of governing parties, opposition, and the functioning of the parliamentary system."},{"title":"Politische Kultur in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11027","justification":"Study of political culture in West Germany in 1972, including trust in political institutions, legitimacy of the political system, and evaluations of democratic governance."},{"title":"Einstellungen zur inneren Sicherheit und zum Staat 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11088","justification":"Survey on attitudes toward internal security and the state in West Germany in 1978, with items on state authority, institutions, and the relationship between citizens and government."},{"title":"Sozialstrukturanalyse und politisches System der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11053","justification":"Links social structure with attitudes to the political system in West Germany in 1976, dealing with political organisations, parties, and institutional trust."},{"title":"Kommunalpolitik und Bürgerbeteiligung in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11011","justification":"Study on local politics and citizen participation in West Germany in 1975, examining local government structures, political organisations at the municipal level, and forms of civic engagement."}]}
